title: Craftable Valueables
description: Craft anything rare from lead to chainmail without travelling everywhere with this new datapack with new recipes for rare items.
body:
### CRAFTABLE VALUEABLES
Don't you guys hate searching 47 villages and mineshafts to find a nametag/lead for a sheep? And trying to find trail keys in trail chambers takes ages, and you keep finding yourself back where you started.

_Well, today I made a data pack which adds recipes for the following items:_

- Chainmail Armor
- Lead
- Nametags
- Heavy Core
- Trial Key/Ominous Key
- Nether Star
- Elyta
- Trident
- Totem Of Undying
- Echo Shards
- Enchanted Apple
- Heart Of The Sea

And more to get added in the **distant future**.

This mod works on 1.21.4 the best, but I'm 99% sure it's compatible on 1.21.5.

Any questions? Comment below, or add my Discord **@notverzee**
